name: The Ultimate AnyScenario (Anime Edition)
description:
I Will Be Making A Better Version Of This.

Basically This Bot Allows You To Be In Any Anime Or Manga, Even AUs Of Them.

This Will Take Time To Perfect, So Report Any Bugs And Comment Any Suggestions For What I Should Add Or Change.

Also, There Will Be A Comics And Games Version. But They Will Also Take Time. And I Have School To Dealt With So Yeah.
creator: Machinationsagain
